query:
SELECT id, name, category, status, price, retailPrice, photos, createdAt
FROM products 
WHERE name LIKE '%Blue Dream%' OR name LIKE '%Test%'
ORDER BY id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT id, name, category, status, price, retailPrice, photos, createdAt
FROM products 
WHERE name LIKE '%Blue Dream%' OR name LIKE '%Test%'
ORDER BY id;
